title: DbSession Depends Type Alias
description: The DbSession type alias in core/database.py:127 is defined as Annotated[AsyncSession, 'database session'] but does not use Depends(get_session). Every route handler repeats the full Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_session)] annotation. Change DbSession to use Depends(get_session) and update all route handlers to use the alias, per CLAUDE.md conventions.
validation: All route handlers use DbSession instead of inline Depends
No functional change to dependency injection behavior
